title: Daily Summary — 2026-05-04
body:
## Recent Activity

Synced window: 2026-05-03T12:18:03Z to 2026-05-04T12:18:03Z. Signals show 18 issues, 11 PRs, 1 discussion, and 0 commits updated.

Activity centered on release/distribution readiness: first-run onboarding, app installation bootstrap, version metadata, scheduled updates, failure reporting, project-management orchestration, route activity labels, and agent assignment. Several PRs merged, while active orchestration continued through child issues and follow-up PRs.

## Recently Active PRs

- Open: [#136 Assign accepted Sepo work to AGENT_HANDLE](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/136) adds best-effort assignment of accepted work to the configured agent handle and reached review synthesis.
- Open: [#134 Show route activity labels while agents run](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/134) implements `agent-running/<route>` labels and was reported ready to ship from child issue #25.
- Open: [#133 Add Sepo version metadata reader CLI](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/133) adds typed `.agent/sepo-version.json` loading plus a `print-sepo-version` CLI.
- Open: [#120 Add GitHub App installation bootstrap](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/120), [#117 Report failed agent runs to Discussions](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/117), and [#116 Add scheduled Sepo update checks](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/116) remain active from the onboarding/distribution track.
- Merged: [#123 Retarget stacked PRs before branch cleanup](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/123), [#130 Add simplified Sepo version metadata foundation](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/130), [#131 Improve orchestrator handoff comments](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/131), and [#62 Add first-run onboarding setup workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62).
- Closed without merge: [#128 Add Sepo version metadata foundation](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/128), superseded by the smaller #130 path.

## Recently Active Issues

- [#126 What's the best way to manage the tasks and project planning for this repo now?](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/126) is actively orchestrating project-management improvements; child #25 completed via PR #134 and child #135 started via PR #136.
- [#74 Create version systems](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/74) continued after the simpler #130 foundation merged; child #132 produced PR #133 for runtime metadata access.
- [#25 Display the corresponding label when running the action](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/25) produced PR #134 for route activity labels.
- [#135 Sub-orchestrator: assign-agent-handle](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/135) produced PR #136.
- [#121](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/121), [#124](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/124), [#125](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/125), [#31](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/31), and [#94](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/94) were updated but do not show completed synced implementation in this window.
- Closed in the window: [#104](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/104), [#105](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/105), [#122](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/122), [#129](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/129), and [#23](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/23).

## Recently Active Discussions

- [#118 Daily Summary — 2026-05-03](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/discussions/118) was updated with project-management summaries and managed-label application notes for active onboarding, distribution, and orchestration work.

## Follow-ups

1. Review and decide merge readiness for open PRs that reached synthesis: #133, #134, and #136.
2. Continue #126 after child #135 / PR #136 resolves, then pick the next project-management slice.
3. Revisit older open distribution PRs #116, #117, and #120 so the onboarding/update/failure-reporting track does not stall.
